title: Executive Order 5202—Reserving Certain Described Lands for Resurvey, California
text:
Under authority contained in the act of June 25, 1910 (36 Stat. 847), as amended by the act of August 24, 1912 (37 Stat. 497), and subject to the conditions, provisions and limitations of said acts, it is hereby ordered that the public lands in Sections 23, 24, 25, 26, 27, 35 and 36, T. 15 S., R. 28 E. and Sections 1, 2 and 12, T. 16 S., R. 28 E., M.D.M., California, be and the same are hereby withdrawn from settlement, location, sale, entry and all forms of appropriation, pending a resurvey of said sections under the act of March 3, 1909 (35 Stat. 845).
This order shall continue in full force and effect unless and until revoked by the President, or by an act of Congress.
HERBERT HOOVER
The White House,
October 7, 1929.
